text: FIDO PET FOOD BANK PET NEEDS PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet care supplies. 14186 Fir Street Suite 203 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 3rd Saturday of the month 9am-2pm Email (503) 655-3663 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-3663 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Past Clackamas County Public Services Building on Kaen Road. Turn left at parking lot F. Beside U-Haul. Services: Pet Care Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMEALS DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - FIDO PET FOOD BANK DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - VETERANS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
